title: Telescopic Insect and Butterfly Net Catching Insects Bugs Fishing Nets, Stainless Steel Handle Extends from 15 Inches to 59 Inches
features: Strong and Durable: Insect catching net is made of high quality shrink stainless steel, durable to use.
Size: Net handle pulled out about 150cm/ 59 inch, shrunk about 40cm / 15inch, metal mesh circle diameter about 28cm / 11inch, net depth 50cm / 19.6inch, mesh spacing 0.15mm.

Outdoor Exploration: This is an outdoor exploration net suitable for children, women, adults and insect collectors to explore nature. Stimulate the motivation of scientific exploration. Provide a fun way to go outdoors, backyard and nature..
Wide Applications: The butterfly net is suitable for outdoor catching activities, such as butterflies, ladybugs, fireflies, fish and other small animals. It is a good choice to get close to nature.

Adjustable: The professional bug catching net is extendible from 40cm (15") to 150cm (59"). You can adjust the length of the handle according to you needs like catching tiny creatures at different heights or for a convenient storage.
description: Product Description Antcher Insect and Butterfly Net Details: Large 28cm / 11inch net ring for collection, 50cm / 2inch net depth for avoiding butterflies flying out. Telescopic handle extends from 40cm / 15.8inch to 150cm / 59inch, perfect for kids, adults and beginning collectors. Mesh spacing 1.2mm. Foldable Easy to carry, easy storage. Quick assembly. Multifunctional: Suitable for outdoor catching activities, such as butterflies, ladybugs, fireflies, fish and other small animals. It is a good choice to get close to nature.
